config.unmet-npc.name: Allow Unmet NPC Customers
config.unmet-npc.desc: When enabled, NPC you haven't met are allowed to come visit your shop (this doesn't count as meeting them).
config.auto-restock-restrict.name: Auto-Restock Restricted
config.auto-restock-restrict.desc: When enabled, only chests adjacent to a cash register or a robo-shopkeep will be used for auto restock.
config.haggle-base-multiplier.name: Haggle Base Multiplier
config.haggle-base-multiplier.desc: Adjust the base multiplier for haggling, before decor bonuses.
config.haggle-autoclick.name: Haggle Auto-click
config.haggle-autoclick.desc: When enabled, haggling automatically completes with a lower price (same as using right-click or cancel button).
config.haggle-speed.name: Haggle Speed
config.haggle-speed.desc: Set the speed of the haggle minigame in terms of number of seconds it takes for the pointer star to cross the entire bar.
config.haggle-wait.name: Haggle Wait
config.haggle-wait.desc: Set the number of seconds to pause after picking something in haggling (you can click to end haggle wait early).
config.haggle-ui-offset.name: Haggle UI Offset
config.haggle-ui-offset.desc: Comma separated haggle UI offset coordinates
